message:
feat(cli): Integrate output module with Config and add CLI flags

- Add OutputConfig to Config struct for theme/output settings:
  - theme: preset name (auto, default, minimal, vibrant, monochrome, light)
  - light_mode: force light mode for dark-on-light terminals
  - plain: force plain output (no colors, no Unicode)
  - force_rich: force rich output even when not a terminal
  - no_unicode: disable Unicode, use ASCII fallbacks

- Add global CLI flags for output control:
  - --plain: force plain output (no colors, no Unicode)
  - --color=auto|always|never: control color output
  - --theme=<preset>: select theme preset

- Add should_use_rich_with_flags() for CLI-aware detection
- Add RichOutput::with_flags() constructor for CLI integration
- Update test_utils/arbitrary.rs to include output field

This completes the output module integration (bd-2nqf), enabling
users to control output styling via config files and CLI flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
